title: Fresh Indian Spaghetti Dosa
description: A crisp dosa made with chickpea batter, layered with sautéed spaghetti and a tangy tomato mother sauce, perfect for a hangover cure.
instructions: Whisk chickpea flour, warm water, tahini, cumin, turmeric, and salt until smooth.
Heat 2 tbsp oil in a nonstick pan over medium heat and pour a thin layer of batter to form a dosa.
Cook until the edges lift and the underside is golden, then flip and cook the other side for 30 seconds.
Add remaining oil to the pan and sauté onion and garlic until translucent, then stir in tomato sauce and chili flakes.
Simmer the sauce for 5 minutes until slightly thickened, seasoning with salt.
Add the cooked spaghetti to the sauce, toss to coat, and let it heat through for 2 minutes.
Layer the spaghetti mixture on the dosa, spread it evenly, then fold the dosa into a rectangular shape.
